output.code:
# Read raw bytes
with open('/mnt/data/file-Pw2TVjuABC6AgJjvs8PEfQ-text_to_analyse.txt', 'rb') as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()

# For convenience, also read as text
text = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')

# Define the spans we think:
spans = [
    ("وَمَن يُقَرِّبَ مِنَ الرَّحْمَانِ إِلَيهِ دَرَجَةً زِدْنَاهُ مَلاَئِكَةً وَرِضْوَانًا", "Aya"),
    ("إِنَّ الدِّينَ يُقَوِّمُ النَفسَ وَيُذَكِّيها", "Hadith"),
    ("إِنَّما الَّذينَ آمَنوا وَعَمِلوا الصالِحاتِ هُمُ الَّذينَ يَتَّقونَ", "Hadith"),
]

# Find byte offsets
results = []
for span_text, ctype in spans:
    span_bytes = span_text.encode('utf-8')
    idx = raw_bytes.find(span_bytes)
    if idx == -1:
        print(f"Span not found: {span_text}")
    else:
        start = idx
        end = idx + len(span_bytes)
        # For verification, extract string slice
        extracted = raw_bytes[start:end].decode('utf-8')
        assert extracted == span_text
        # Also print character-based index maybe
        # But we need byte index
        results.append((span_text, ctype, start, end))
results
